name: Markdown Ingestion and Page Tools Unit

output.name: overwriteResult
output.type: { deck: Deck; slide: Slide; markdown: string }

output.name: parsedSlideElements
output.type: { title: string; elements: ElementModel[]; bgHtml?: string }

validate.v1: markdown parser must preserve heading-derived title
validate.v2: table/chart/background fenced directives map into slide elements
validate.v3: page-targeted operations require existing deck and slide

constraints: Markdown transformation is deterministic for same input
Element zIndex is normalized during overwrite
Runtime conversion supports text, shape, and image composition
description: Transforms markdown into slide model state and exposes page-scoped read/overwrite/append behaviors.
